subcategory: goey clipped image gallery with gradient overlays
use_cases: Displaying image galleries with artistic blob-shaped clip masks
Portfolio or creative showcase sections with animated hover effects
Product galleries with colorful gradient backgrounds and goey transitions
Decorative hero sections featuring abstract clipped artwork
Visual storytelling sections with morphing clip-path animations
ai_summary: A visually striking image gallery component featuring CSS clip-path goey blob effects that create organic, morphing shapes around images. The component showcases six media items with distinct gradient color schemes (golden, green, red, orange, teal, sage) that transition smoothly on hover from p-8 to p-4 padding. Designed for creative portfolios, product showcases, and decorative sections where visual impact and artistic flair are prioritized over data-heavy content display.
